HelpText: This section has real hacks! Use at your own risk. Don't come crying if you get banned.
Confirmation:
I hereby confirm, that I am solely responsible for any consequences and use these Tweaks/Hacks at my own risk!

None of these hacks are persistent!

USE IT AS IT IS, THERE WILL BE NO SUPPORT (NEITHER IN DMs NOR IN DISCORD SERVERS)
HacksUI_AcceptanceHack_Help:
This will skip all teleporting and walking to each hunt board.
All enabled Hunt bills will be accepted from anywhere you are.
GetFlightAllowedStatus_Help:
This unlocks flying in ALL areas where mounting is allowed.
Even if you don't have progressed the MSQ or collected all Aether Currents for that zone
GetGrandCompanyRank_Help:
Forces the expert delivery window to show regardless of rank.
Only in effect if you do not have expert delivery unlocked.
(Restored from CBT)
